overall.description: A female character walks steadily across a vast white salt flat desert with distant mountains. Sparse low bushes are scattered across the cracked white ground. The footage is clearly from a game engine, featuring a third-person follow camera and on-screen UI prompts for movement controls.

scene_state.functional_zone: salt flat desert with scattered shrubs

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the white salt flat toward distant mountains, passing scattered desert bushes

entered.detail: snow-capped mountain range spanning the horizon under clear blue sky
vast white cracked salt flat ground extending in all directions
sparse low-lying desert vegetation scattered across the flat terrain

segments.scene_description: The character walks across the vast white salt flat with distant mountains visible on the horizon. Sparse desert bushes are scattered throughout the landscape, and the character passes by several of them. The terrain is flat and cracked, extending endlessly toward the mountain range.

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk across the barren salt flat away from the vegetation clusters

segments.scene_description: Continuing across the open salt flat, the character moves away from the scattered vegetation into an even more barren area. The distant mountains remain visible ahead, and the cracked white ground stretches uniformly in all directions.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a vast salt flat that transitions from a sparsely vegetated landscape into a completely barren expanse. It begins with the character walking across the cracked white ground, passing by several scattered desert bushes with distant mountains framing the horizon. As the character advances, the camera maintains its steady follow, moving away from the remaining patches of vegetation. The scene then opens into an even more desolate area where the uniform, cracked terrain stretches endlessly in all directions before finally centering on the unchanging silhouette of the mountains ahead.
